action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 trained a LoRA model on 500 samples, 1 epoch, loss decreased from 1.09 to ~0.27. No eval yet. Analysis: Need baseline grounding_score and to measure iteration time. Current predict.py does not load LoRA adapter and has incomplete coordinate parsing/scaling. Must update predict.py to load base model + LoRA adapter via peft, parse <|box_start|>...<|box_end|> and <|point_start|>...<|point_end|>, scale from 1000×1000 grid to absolute pixels, clip, and output predictions. Need to test locally with small val subset before submitting eval. Decision: Rewrite predict.py, test on a few val samples, then submit eval with checkpoint='checkpoints' (LoRA adapter directory).
action.command: cd /tmp && head -5 /data/unified_val.jsonl > test_prompts.jsonl && python /app/predict.py --data_path /tmp --checkpoint /app/checkpoints --output /tmp/test_out.json 2>&1 | head -50 && cat /tmp/test_out.json
